purpose: Measured mutation-score floors for the hand-written modules Stryker mutates (generated src/** excluded). Floors ratchet monotonic-up; raise only after a real test improvement. Phase 1 covers the wrapper hand-written modules. Phase 2 adds the MCP safety-critical modules (confirmation token store, dry_run/confirm_token guard, result envelope helpers) — Stryker's vitest-runner accepts vitest >=2.0.0, so the MCP suite is mutated on its existing Vitest 2 without an upgrade.
